stmt: WITH pgrst_source AS ( SELECT "public"."inquiries".*, row_to_json("inquiries_client_1".*)::jsonb AS "client" FROM "public"."inquiries" LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT "clients_1"."id", "clients_1"."full_name", "clients_1"."email", "clients_1"."phone" FROM "public"."clients" AS "clients_1" WHERE "clients_1"."id" = "public"."inquiries"."client_id"   LIMIT $1 OFFSET $2 ) AS "inquiries_client_1" ON TRUE WHERE  "public"."inquiries"."tenant_id" = $3 AND  "public"."inquiries"."deleted_at" IS NULL  ORDER BY "public"."inquiries"."created_at" DESC  LIMIT $4 OFFSET $5 )  SELECT null::bigint AS total_result_set, pg_catalog.count(_postgrest_t) AS page_total, coalesce(json_agg(_postgrest_t), '[]') AS body, nullif(current_setting('response.headers', true), '') AS response_headers, nullif(current_setting('response.status', true), '') AS response_status, '' AS response_inserted FROM ( SELECT * FROM pgrst_source ) _postgrest_t
BEGIN ISOLATION LEVEL READ COMMITTED READ ONLY

select set_config('search_path', $1, true), set_config('role', $2, true), set_config('request.jwt.claims', $3, true), set_config('request.method', $4, true), set_config('request.path', $5, true), set_config('request.headers', $6, true), set_config('request.cookies', $7, true)

COPY (SELECT
  pg_stat_activity.pid,
  COALESCE(pg_class.relname, 'null') AS relname,
  COALESCE(pg_locks.transactionid::text, 'null') AS transactionid,
  pg_locks.granted,
  pg_stat_activity.query AS stmt,
  age(now(), pg_stat_activity.query_start)::text AS age
FROM pg_stat_activity, pg_locks LEFT OUTER JOIN pg_class ON (pg_locks.relation = pg_class.oid)
WHERE pg_stat_activity.query <> '<insufficient privilege>'
AND pg_locks.pid = pg_stat_activity.pid
AND pg_locks.mode = 'ExclusiveLock'
ORDER BY query_start
) TO STDOUT WITH CSV HEADER
